We are a company skilled in the installation, maintenance and upgrade of next-generation wind turbines, driven by the mission of making energy transition faster and more cost-efficient.

DISCOVER MORE → OUR PROJECTS
I SCROLL TO EXPLORE
11
Countries

With major operational branches in Sweden, Turkey, Germany, Italy, we deliver high-quality services in the energy transition across Europe.

2.6GW+
Installed in 5 years

Over 2.6 GW of wind capacity installed in five years, demonstrating strong operational performance and reliable delivery of large-scale projects.

What we do
Our Services
Pre-Installation

We support pre-installation of concrete and steel towers, including 5MW+, ensuring safe, efficient setup through planning, supervision, concrete and steel assembly, advanced tools and lean methods for precision.

Preventive Maintenance

We provide preventive programs to protect turbine performance with cleaning, lubrication, torquing, and UT/DT inspections, detecting issues early to ensure reliability, safety, and long-term efficiency.

Staffing Solutions

We offer staffing solutions across Europe, providing qualified technical professionals for short-term assignments under six months, enabling rapid response to operational needs even without local entities.

750k+
Installation Hours

Over 750,000 man-hours of wind turbine installation experience accumulated in the past five years. This extensive field expertise ensures high-quality execution, safety, and reliability across all delivered projects.

564
GE Units Installed

In the last five years, 564 GE wind turbine units have been installed, contributing to more than 2.6 GW of additional installed power capacity. This achievement reflects solid technical capability and strong operational performance.

Safety First 🛡

Safety guides every activity and decision. Teams are encouraged to apply STOP work, report risks, and work within standardized processes that protect both people and operations.

Innovation & Productivity ⚡

Advanced technologies, digital tools, and engineered solutions from key partners accelerate execution, reduce time and cost, and enhance the productivity of field teams.

Quality & Lean Execution ✦

Operational excellence is driven by clear procedures, continuous measurement, and ongoing improvement. The Lean approach ensures visibility, reduces errors, and enables consistent, repeatable processes across all projects.
